title: Substance Use Disorder Crisis Intervention - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Substance Use Disorder Crisis Intervention 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTRAL CITY CONCERN HOOPER DETOXIFICATION STABILIZATION CENTER HOOPER DETOXIFICATION AND STABILIZATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical detoxification and stabilization from chemical dependency by providing outreach, sobering, and sub-acute medical detoxification. During the 6-10 day stay, clients receive medical treatment for early withdrawal symptoms, counseling, and referrals to other programs. 1535 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with no major medical problems that need to be addressed in a hospital setting Hours: Inpatient admission: Monday-Friday 6:45am-7:45am Outpatient: Monday-Friday 1pm-4pm Business: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 238-2067 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WHITE BIRD CLINIC CAHOOTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mobile crisis intervention services. Responds to a range of non-criminal crises, including intoxication, disorientation, substance use and mental health issues, dispute resolution, and street facilitation. Transport to treatment is also provided. Service is confidential, voluntary, and staffed and managed by White Bird Clinic. Home visits available. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: People who require crisis intervention Hours: 7 days per week 11am-11pm; service hours may vary depending on staff availability Email (541) 726-3714 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL CITY CONCERN HOOPER DETOXIFICATION AND STABILIZATION CENTER WHITE BIRD CLINIC CAHOOTS
